videos.title: "BIKE CHANNEL" at BIANCHI FELICE GIMONDI gran fondo
videos.description:
This is the review of the italian specialized channel Bike Channel about the Bianchi Felice Gimondi Gran Fondo. In that event held on 2015 May 10th Bianchi invited more than 250 partners to celebrate its 130th anniversary 

Questo è il report del canale specializzato Bike Channel sulla gran fondo Bianchi Felice Gimondi. Per questo evento, tenutosi il 10 Maggio 2015, Bianchi ha invitato oltre 250 partners per festeggiare il suo 130° anniversario

videos.title: BGY AIRPORT GRANFONDO 2024 -  BERGAMO - Partenza Completa -(ex FELICE GIMONDI)
granfondo Felice Gimondi 100515
videos.description: This is a summary video clip of our experience of granfondo Felice Gimondi, in the mountains and countryside of Lombardia, with Bianchi Team Cyprus and Cycling Club Klirou. Starting from Bergamo, there were a fantastic round route in the Alps. I also add some material of the pre-event rides around the city of Bergamo and the lake Iseo. Enjoy! More details of the route are available in my strava account: https://www.strava.com/activities/301736264 Enjoy!
